overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the NCART monorail system in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City, traveling through elevated tracks above a dystopian urban landscape during golden hour. The journey passes industrial zones with cargo containers, dense residential towers, and stops at a station platform before continuing through narrow urban canyons.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track above industrial district

agents.ego_description: seated inside NCART train observing the industrial cityscape through the window

entered.detail: metal window frames and pillars of the NCART train interior
illuminated digital transit map showing the NCART network routes
large red cylindrical water tank on metal supports
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible through the hazy atmosphere
metal rails and support beams of the monorail system

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside the NCART train, looking out at Night City's industrial district during golden hour. A prominent red water tower stands against the hazy skyline of distant skyscrapers. The train moves steadily along elevated tracks with the illuminated route map visible on the right interior panel.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated track through mixed industrial-residential zone

events.description: sun glare intensifies as the train turns westward toward the setting sun
passing from industrial zone into area with dense residential towers

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride the train as it curves through the city, observing the changing landscape and distant flying vehicles

entered.detail: industrial cargo area with stacked orange and green shipping containers
tall apartment buildings with numerous illuminated windows
bright orange sun creating lens flare through the hazy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The train curves rightward, bringing the setting sun into direct view and bathing the scene in warm orange light. The landscape transitions from industrial structures to dense residential towers, with a shipping container yard visible below the elevated tracks. Flying vehicles can be seen in the distant sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station platform with passenger amenities

events.description: train decelerates as it approaches the station platform
train arrives at covered station platform, doors open to reveal waiting area

agents.ego_description: seated in the stopped train observing passengers waiting on the platform

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing on platform near the train doors waiting to board

entered.detail: concrete platform with yellow safety lines and tiled flooring
illuminated cyan NCART logo and station name signs
orange seating arranged along the platform wall
automated kiosks with glowing screens for passenger services

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at an NCART station platform, decelerating smoothly to a stop. The platform features distinctive cyan neon signage, orange waiting benches, and vending machines. Two pedestrians stand waiting near the train doors as the vehicle comes to a halt, transitioning from the open track to the sheltered station environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed elevated track corridor between buildings

events.description: train accelerates departing the station platform
entering enclosed tunnel section with significantly reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: riding the train as it departs the station into the dark enclosed track section between buildings

entered.detail: dark concrete walls of the enclosed trackway passing extremely close to the train
illuminated windows of adjacent residential buildings visible through the darkness

segments.scene_description: The train departs the station and immediately enters a dark, enclosed track section running between tightly packed buildings. The lighting drops significantly as concrete walls pass within meters of the train windows. Warm light glows from the windows of adjacent residential buildings, creating a contrast with the dark corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon between high-rise residential towers

events.description: automated announcement indicates next stop: Glen North
emerging from fully enclosed tunnel into open urban canyon with close building proximity

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dense urban canyon, observing street level activity and neon signs on nearby structures

entered.detail: tall building facades passing within close proximity to the train windows
illuminated commercial billboards and brand advertisements on building sides
multi-lane street visible far below with moving vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The train moves through a narrow urban canyon with high-rise buildings passing extremely close to the windows. Neon advertisement signs glow on nearby structures, and the street level with moving traffic becomes visible far below. An automated announcement indicates the next stop is Glen North as the train continues its journey through the dense cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open industrial skyline into the claustrophobic depths of a dense urban canyon. It begins inside an NCART train gliding past a red water tower and hazy skyscrapers, with an illuminated route map visible on the interior panel. As the train curves rightward, the setting sun bathes the scene in warm orange light, shifting the view from shipping container yards to towering residential blocks and distant flying vehicles. The movement then slows as the train pulls into a sheltered station characterized by cyan neon signage and orange benches, before accelerating away and plunging into a dark, enclosed track section. Finally, the environment tightens into a narrow corridor of concrete walls and glowing neon advertisements, passing high-rise buildings and distant street traffic as the train heads toward Glen North.
